title: High Season for Citrus | Mas du Chanoine
description: High Season for Citrus: French Riviera event near our guesthouse.
paragraphs: The lemon is an emblematic fruit of the French Riviera, especially the famous Menton lemon. Every year, the three lemon trees on the property give us a lot of fruits. We prepare the lemon jam to complement your breakfasts. For your welcome, we also offer "Lemon wine", a subtle blend of white wine from Provence, alcohol, lemons and sugar, macerated for 45 days.
